entry.title: Welcome to the blog
entry.content:
This is your first blog post. You can edit this file to introduce yourself and the blog.

Getting Started

To create a new post:

  1. Create a new file in src/posts/
  2. Add frontmatter with title, description, date, and tags: [post]
  3. Write your content in Markdown
  4. Run npm run build (or let pre-commit handle it)
  5. Commit and push

Post Format

Posts support:

  • Markdown formatting
  • Code blocks with syntax highlighting
  • Blockquotes
  • Images
  • Links

Happy writing!
